bullets.details: Anthropic is reportedly testing "Claude Mythos," a significant leap in coding and reasoning capabilities. Early access is being strictly limited due to concerns that the model's high-level capabilities could be misused for large-scale cyberattacks.

Starting April 24, GitHub will use interaction data (code, prompts, comments) from personal Copilot tiers (Free, Pro, Pro+) to train its AI models by default. Users must manually opt out in privacy settings; Business and Enterprise accounts are excluded.
bullets.topic: GitHub Updates Copilot Data Training Policy

bullets.details: A federal judge issued a preliminary injunction against the U.S. government, blocking its attempt to blacklist Anthropic. The court cited First Amendment retaliation and noted the \"supply chain risk\" designation lacked statutory evidence.
bullets.topic: Court Blocks Government Blacklist of Anthropic

bullets.details: Anthropic executives are reportedly discussing a potential Q4 IPO, with bankers estimating a valuation exceeding $60 billion for the AI firm.
bullets.topic: Anthropic Weighs IPO Plans with $60B Valuation Target

bullets.details: AI note-taking startup Granola has raised $125 million in a round led by Index Ventures, reaching a $1.5 billion valuation. The funding will support the integration of Claude and the development of new agentic AI capabilities.
bullets.topic: Granola Reaches $1.5B Valuation in New Funding Round

bullets.details: Moonshot AI has secured over $1 billion in funding led by Alibaba and HongShan, pushing the Beijing-based startup's valuation to roughly $2.5 billion. The company is known for its proprietary large language model, Kimi Chat.
bullets.topic: Moonshot AI Raises $1 Billion to Expand Generative AI Development

bullets.details: Mistral AI has released Voxtral TTS, an open-source, low-latency text-to-speech model. Optimized for enterprise voice agents and edge devices, it supports nine languages and can clone custom voices with under five seconds of sample audio.

ATLAS is a new open-source framework that enables high-performance coding agent workflows on consumer hardware (RTX 5060 Ti). It features local planning and repair, offering performance comparable to major APIs at a fraction of the cost.
bullets.topic: ATLAS AI Framework Enables Efficient Local Coding Agents

bullets.details: Chroma has released Context-1, a 20B parameter model designed for efficient, multi-hop agentic search. It utilizes a novel self-editing mechanism to prune irrelevant tokens mid-search, enabling frontier-level retrieval performance at lower latency.

Cloud provider Vultr is reportedly seeking to raise over $1 billion to scale its infrastructure capacity, reflecting the continued, intense market demand for hardware capable of supporting large-scale AI workloads.
bullets.topic: Vultr Seeks $1B Funding for AI Infrastructure Expansion

digest_summary: Anthropic is dominating headlines as it tests the powerful "Claude Mythos" model, considers a $60B IPO, and secures a court victory against government blacklisting. Meanwhile, the AI funding boom continues with Granola reaching a $1.5B valuation and Moonshot AI raising $1B, while Vultr seeks similar capital to expand infrastructure. On the technical front, GitHub has updated its Copilot training policy, Mistral launched its open-source "Voxtral" TTS model, and new frameworks like ATLAS and Chroma’s Context-1 are pushing the boundaries of efficient local and agentic AI.
digest_title: Anthropic’s Big Week: New Models, IPO Rumors, and Court Wins Lead a Busy AI Landscape
